reviews.comment: It's a very good place. The Atmosphere and the Service is also best 👌 And I just love there food . They food Quality is alos so good as well maintaing proper Hygiene.

reviewReply.comment:
Hi Karan,
Thank you for sharing such wonderful feedback! We’re delighted to know you enjoyed the atmosphere, service, and food quality. Maintaining hygiene and serving flavors you love is something we truly care about, and it’s rewarding to hear it reflected in your experience. We look forward to welcoming you back soon for more good times at Coffee Island.☕

We’re so glad you loved the ambience and the coffee! Creating a space that feels warm and welcoming while serving a great cup is what we strive for. Can’t wait to host you again at Coffee Island!

reviewReply.comment:
Hi Raj, 
Thank you for sharing your experience with us. We’re truly listening and are already looking into the points you raised about service and atmosphere at our Amanora Mall café. We’d love the chance to connect with you directly and make this right. Please feel free to DM us on Instagram @coffee.island.in or write to us at hello@coffeeisland.in so we can welcome you back for a better experience.
Thanks a latte for the 5 stars! Your support keeps us brewing our best every day.

reviews.comment:
Worst cafe I have experienced in my life.
We visited here on 13 September 2025.

The food is extremely expensive. And the quantity is very less. When we order any dish, we expect a full plate of it, but they just gave two bytes of the dish. This is really hopeless.

Also the taste is not good. Service is also very slow.

So never visit at this place. It is a complete waste of money.

reviewReply.comment:
Hi Jatin, 
We hear you and take your feedback very seriously. The concerns you’ve highlighted around taste, quantity, and service speed are already being addressed with our team at Amanora. We’d love to understand your experience better and make amends. Please reach out to us via DM on Instagram @coffee.island.in or write to hello@coffeeisland.in so we can connect personally and improve your experience .
